name: TCIL_MakeDdopAvailable
title: TCIL_MakeDdopAvailable
syntax: long TCIL_MakeDdopAvailable(dbNode tc, char[] ddopPath[]); // form 2
description: Loads a device descriptor object pool (DDOP) into the Task Controller.
Represents the situation that the DDOP is available on the side of Task Controller (e.g. via task file). An available DDOP can be activated with the Object-pool Activate message.

parameters.name: tc
parameters.description: Task Controller simulation node to apply the function.

parameters.name: ddopPath
parameters.description: Path of the DDOP file (*.XML). Path has to be absolute or relative relating to the folder of the CANoe configuration.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
